export class ArenaLeaderboardParser{constructor(){this._entries=[];}flush(){this._entries=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._entries=[];// 1) total rows
const total=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<total;i++){const userId=wrapper.readInt();const username=wrapper.readString();const figure=wrapper.readString();const level=wrapper.readInt();const wins=wrapper.readInt();const losses=wrapper.readInt();this._entries.push({userId,username,figure,level,wins,losses});}return true;}get entries(){return this._entries;}}
